backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Home, About Us, Contact Us, and 30+ grocery platform pages) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend page and component file paths to short descriptions summarizing each file's purpose and content.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the FreshCart app, loading Poppins/Inter fonts and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (30+ pages) wrapped in a shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shared layout component providing the top announcement bar, responsive navbar with search, category dropdown, cart count, and navigation links.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Reusable product card component displaying product image, price, discount badge, and an add-to-cart button with brief confirmation feedback.
frontend/src/data/products.ts: Static product catalog defining the Product interface and an array of all products across multiple grocery categories with pricing, units, and emoji.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet using Tailwind CSS with a FreshCart brand theme defined via OKLCH CSS custom properties for light/dark modes, plus reusable component classes for buttons, cards, and layout utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutUs.tsx: Static About Us page displaying FreshCart's mission, team members, company values, and milestone timeline using hardcoded data and Lucide icons.
frontend/src/pages/AllCategories.tsx: Static page listing all 13 product categories as styled grid cards with emoji icons, descriptions, and links to their respective category routes.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that renders a grid of 9 hardcoded blog post cards with category color coding, read time, and links to individual post pages.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Renders an individual blog post page using a postId route param, displaying hardcoded post content, metadata, and related posts with navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/Careers.tsx: Displays a careers page with a list of job openings, company perks, and an application form that saves the submitted role and navigates to a confirmation state.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that reads from localStorage-backed cart utilities, supports quantity changes, item removal, coupon code application, and navigates to checkout.
frontend/src/pages/CategoryPage.tsx: Reusable category product listing page with search filtering and sort options (price, discount), rendering products via ProductCard for a given category prop.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout form page that validates delivery address and phone fields, saves the order to localStorage, clears the cart, and redirects to the order confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUs.tsx: A contact page with a form (name, email, phone, subject, message) with validation and simulated submission, alongside contact info cards (address, phone, email, hours) and a map placeholder.
frontend/src/pages/DealsOffers.tsx: A deals page displaying copyable coupon codes and a grid of products filtered to those with at least 20% discount off MRP.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInformation.t: A static informational page detailing FreshCart's delivery features, fees, hours, special instructions, and a table of supported cities with delivery times.
frontend/src/pages/FAQ.tsx: An accordion-style FAQ page organized into categories (Orders, Payments, Returns, Account) with togglable question/answer items.
frontend/src/pages/ForgotPassword.tsx: A forgot-password page with an email input form that simulates sending a reset link and shows a success confirmation state.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The main homepage featuring an auto-playing hero carousel, category quick-links, feature highlights, and product grids sourced from ALL_PRODUCTS.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page component with email/password form validation, password visibility toggle, and simulated authentication that stores user session in localStorage before navigating home.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Order confirmation page that reads the last order from localStorage and displays a success message, delivery status info, itemized order summary, and links to track the order or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistory.tsx: Order history page that loads past orders from localStorage and renders each order's ID, date, item preview, total, and a link to order tracking, with an empty-state prompt if no orders exist.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTracking.tsx: Order tracking page with an order ID search form that, when submitted, displays a static multi-step progress timeline showing the order's current fulfillment status.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx: Static privacy policy page that renders a list of predefined sections (data collection, usage, sharing, cookies, security, rights, retention, contact) with a page banner and breadcrumb navigation.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page that fetches a product by route param, displays its emoji image, pricing with discount, star rating, tags, quantity selector, and an add-to-cart action, plus a related products grid.
frontend/src/pages/RefundReturnPolicy.ts: Displays FreshCart's refund and return policy page with sections covering return eligibility, non-returnable items, return process, refund timelines, and cancellation policy, along with a quick-summary card grid.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Registration form page that collects name, email, phone, and password with client-side validation, then stores user data in localStorage and redirects to home on success.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResults.tsx: Search results page that reads a query param, filters products via searchProducts, supports sorting by price or discount, and renders matching ProductCards in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/pages/StoreLocator.tsx: Store locator page that lets users check delivery availability by pincode against a hardcoded serviceable list and browse FreshCart dark store locations filterable by city.
frontend/src/pages/TermsConditions.tsx: Static terms and conditions page that renders a predefined array of policy sections (acceptance, usage, accounts, orders, delivery, IP, liability, governing law) in a formatted layout.
frontend/src/pages/UserProfile.tsx: A user profile page that reads/writes name, email, and phone from localStorage, allowing inline editing with save functionality, and displays a sidebar with navigation links to Profile, My Orders, and Addresses.
frontend/src/pages/Wishlist.tsx: A static wishlist page that displays an empty-state message with a heart icon and a 'Browse Products' link, as no wishlist items are implemented yet.
frontend/src/utils/cart.ts: Utility module for managing a localStorage-backed shopping cart, exporting functions to get, add, update, remove, and clear cart items, and dispatching a custom 'cartUpdated' event on changes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that enables dark mode, sets up custom brand colors (green/orange in oklch), extended font families (Poppins, Inter), border radii, box shadows, and includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a multi-page grocery delivery website (FreshCart) built with HTML/CSS/Bootstrap/JS, listing all implemented features, required images, architectural notes, and 35+ planned pages.
